properties.SQL Query:
INSERT INTO dim_date (
  full_date,
  year,
  quarter,
  month,
  month_name,
  day_of_month,
  day_name,
  is_weekend
)
VALUES (
  TO_DATE('${FULLDATE}','YYYY-MM-DD'),
  ${YEAR},
  ${QUARTER},
  ${MONTH},
  '${MONTHNAME}',
  ${DAYOFMONTH},
  '${DAY_NAME}',
  ${ISWEEKEND}
)

properties.SQL Query: SELECT DATE_SK FROM DIM_DATE WHERE full_date = to_date('${FULLDATE}', 'yyyy-MM-dd')
